finding: After adopting the existing lane, next --claim still minted a new requested lane unless ATM_LANE_SESSION_ID was injected manually. The first-layer guidance did not make this environment requirement obvious.
expectedBehavior: A successful lane adopt should make the next command copyable and self-contained, or next --claim should reuse the adopted active lane for the same actor/task without requiring hidden environment propagation.
evidenceOrRepro: node atm.mjs lane adopt lane-20260719134847-codex-governance-optimizer-ef8a433602 --actor codex-governance-optimizer --confirm --json succeeded. A subsequent next --claim without ATM_LANE_SESSION_ID still requested a new lane and failed. A Node spawn with ATM_LANE_SESSION_ID succeeded.
followUp: Expose a copyable Windows-safe continuation command after lane adopt and teach next --claim to read/reuse adopted same-task lane state by default when safe.
